---
title: "Lesson 1: Introduction to Bobbology"
date: "2026-05-09"
order: 2
description: "A field guide to the audible compass and its relations: Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons. How memory works in ekos. Why humans hold the pen at the decision gate."
categories: [bobble, bobbology, ai]
path: /introduction-to-bobbology.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/introduction-to-bobbology.html">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/introduction-to-bobbology.html");</script>
```
